options.name: --story-file
options.description: (Default: true) Pass this flag to generate a storybook file

options.name: --page
options.description:
(Default: false) Pass this flag to generate a page with
routing capabilities instead of a component

options.name: --path
options.description: Required. Relative path where to generate the component

options.name: --name
options.description: Required. The name of the component or page

options.name: --service-file
options.description:
(Default: true) Pass this flag to generate a service file
with the page or component

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --type
options.description:
Required. Type of Lambda. Options are: api,
dynamo-worker, worker, sqs-worker

options.name: --add-dynamo
options.description: Pass this flag to add DynamoDB to the project

options.name: --add-elasticsearch
options.description: Pass this flag to add permissions for Elastic Search

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --integrations
options.description:
External packages to integrate with this Shared Project.
Seperated by a comma. Valid values are: dynamo

options.name: --description
options.description: Required. Description of this shared package

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --build-variables-group-name
options.description:
(Default: Build Variables) Name of the
Variable group containing all the build
variables e.g. "Build Variables"

options.name: --echo
options.description: Echos the current Setup configuration

options.name: --delete
options.description: Delete a setup

options.name: --org-name
options.description:
The Name of the orginazation e.g. Microsoft
(Pty) Ltd

options.name: --azure-org
options.description:
Name of the orginazation in Azure DevOps e.g.
https://dev.azure.com/microsoft (Only the last
part)

options.name: --azure-project
options.description:
Project Name in Azure DevOps e.g.
https://dev.azure.com/microsoft/Calculator_Pro
ject (Only the last part)

options.name: --org-prefix
options.description:
Prefix of the orginazation e.g. MS for
Microsoft. Should be between 2 and 3 chars,
and contain no numbers

options.name: --feed-source-url
options.description:
The source url of the private feed hosted in
Azure Devops e.g.
https://pkgs.dev.azure.com/microsoft/_packagin
g/Microsoft/nuget/v3/index.json

options.name: --feed-source-pat
options.description:
Personal Access Token to access the private
feed

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.description: Display version information.
